name: ASSOCIATED BANC-CORP
summary: PARTI General Associated Banc-Corp is a bank holding company registered pursuant to the BHC Act. Our bank subsidiary, Associated Bank, traces its history back to the founding of the Bank of Neenah in 1861. We were incorporated in Wisconsin in 1964 and were inactive until 1969 when permission was received from the Federal Reserve to acquire three banks. At December31, 2025, we owned one nationally chartered commercial bank headquartered in Green Bay, Wisconsin, which serves local communities acro...
